2026-05-30T15:55:16.189653Zharden_filtered_port127.0.0.1:21high0.8FalsePolicy permits only TCP/443. FTP on TCP/21 is filtered: cleartext credentials & data exfiltration. Disable or replace with SFTP (port 22 inside a bastion) or FTPS over TLS 1.2+; block 21/tcp at the perimeter.
2026-05-30T15:55:16.189965Zharden_filtered_port127.0.0.1:22high0.8FalsePolicy permits only TCP/443. SSH on TCP/22 is filtered: remote interactive shell. Restrict to bastion hosts behind a VPN; enforce key-based auth + hardware MFA; deny root login; fail2ban; audit authorized_keys.

2026-05-30T15:55:16.301019Zharden_filtered_port127.0.0.1:512high0.8FalsePolicy permits only TCP/443. REXEC on TCP/512 is filtered: legacy Berkeley remote shell. Remove rexec/rlogin/rsh; replace with SSH; block 512-514/tcp.
2026-05-30T15:55:16.301065Zharden_filtered_port127.0.0.1:513high0.8FalsePolicy permits only TCP/443. RLOGIN on TCP/513 is filtered: legacy trust-based remote login. Decommission; replace with SSH key auth.
2026-05-30T15:55:16.301233Zharden_filtered_port127.0.0.1:514high0.8FalsePolicy permits only TCP/443. SYSLOG/RSH on TCP/514 is filtered: cleartext logging & legacy shell. Use TLS-protected syslog (RFC 5425) or HTTPS-based log shipping; remove rsh entirely.

2026-05-30T15:55:16.558572Zharden_filtered_port127.0.0.1:2375high0.8FalsePolicy permits only TCP/443. DOCKER on TCP/2375 is filtered: unauthenticated Docker API. Never expose 2375; use 2376 with mTLS only on management networks; prefer Unix socket + sudo.
2026-05-30T15:55:16.558609Zharden_filtered_port127.0.0.1:2376high0.8FalsePolicy permits only TCP/443. DOCKER-TLS on TCP/2376 is filtered: Docker API (TLS). Restrict to management VLAN; rotate client certs; prefer SSH+kubectl/docker context.
